statement: I was walking my dog when I saw someone suspicious climbing through the window of the research greenhouse late at night.
While working the late shift, I distinctly heard the sound of breaking glass coming from the east wing of the building.
During my evening jog, I noticed a black van parked outside with its lights off for over two hours.
I remember smelling something burning around midnight, which seemed very unusual for that time.
As I was closing up shop, I saw three people in dark clothes running from the back entrance.
From my apartment window, I watched someone tampering with the security cameras using some kind of tool.
During my security rounds, I heard loud banging noises coming from the storage area around 2 AM.
I spotted a person wearing a maintenance uniform at an odd hour when no maintenance was scheduled.
While walking home, I saw someone throwing what looked like documents into a dumpster behind the building.
I heard an alarm going off briefly before it was suddenly silenced in an unusual way.
From my balcony, I observed someone picking the lock on the side entrance using professional tools.
During my night shift, I noticed the security cameras were showing looped footage of empty hallways.
I saw a group of people loading large crates into a white truck around midnight.
While closing up the cafe across the street, I witnessed someone disabling the exterior lights systematically.
I heard what sounded like power tools being used inside the building well past closing time.
From my office window, I saw someone in a security uniform but they were wearing sneakers instead of regulation boots.
That day, I received an email from a colleague saying something was wrong with the alarm system. I went to check it out, but didn’t find anything unusual.
During my evening walk, I saw multiple flashlights moving around inside the closed building.
I remember hearing a heated argument in a foreign language coming from the parking garage.
While delivering packages, I noticed the side door had fresh scratch marks around the lock.
I saw someone repeatedly taking photos of the buildings security camera locations earlier that day.
During my shift at the coffee shop, I overheard someone discussing detailed plans of the buildings layout.

I saw someone copying what looked like security codes near the entrance keypad.
During my night patrol, I found fresh tire tracks leading to the normally unused loading dock.
I witnessed someone in a delivery uniform but the company logo looked obviously fake.
From my window, I saw people loading artwork into an unmarked van at 3 AM.
I noticed the security lights were deliberately covered with some kind of dark material.
While cleaning the windows, I saw someone testing different keys on the back entrance.
I heard unusual drilling sounds coming from the vault area after hours.
During my evening run, I saw multiple people wearing identical outfits entering through different doors.
I noticed someone taking detailed notes while observing the guard rotation schedule.
From my desk, I saw a person in a maintenance uniform but they seemed unfamiliar with the basic layout.
I heard what sounded like radio communications in code coming from the parking structure.

During my shift, I noticed the security cameras were being systematically redirected.
I heard unusual beeping sounds coming from the alarm control panel.
From the parking lot, I saw someone copying down the security patrol schedule.
I noticed fresh damage to the lock on the rear storage entrance.
While walking nearby, I saw multiple people carrying large duffel bags from the building.
I observed someone using sophisticated equipment to bypass the card readers.
During my patrol, I found evidence of someone monitoring the security camera feeds.
I saw unusual activity near the ventilation system access points.
From my office, I noticed someone attempting to access restricted areas repeatedly.
I heard power tools being used in the artifact storage area after hours.
While cleaning, I found discarded professional lock-picking tools.
I observed multiple people communicating via hand signals near the entrance.
During my shift, I noticed the emergency exits had been tampered with.
I saw someone holding a keycard marked QX- succeeded by a two-digit odd number.
From the street, I noticed unusual activity on the normally empty top floor.
I heard what sounded like heavy equipment being moved late at night.
While passing by, I saw someone disabling the external security lights.
I noticed a suspicious gathering in the parking garage after hours.
During my rounds, I found evidence of someone monitoring staff movements.
